Area Boss:
Area Boss (地域鬼王) is a gameplay mechanism that is accessed via the bottom bar in Explore. It is unlocked at player level 30 and is open from 6:00 to 24:00, where rewards are distributed.

== Introduction ==
Area Boss is, basically put, a way to challenge bosses in different regions. However, bosses require Fame in order to be found: the greater the Fame, the greater the search distance, the more bosses that can be found. Each boss will also have differing conditions to be challenged, which changes by the day.

== Fame ==
All players begin with 300 fame. With every 1 point of fame that the player gains (and player does not lose fame), the challenge radius for Area Bosses increases by 1000 m. Furthermore, fame affects the number of different bosses that can be challenged per day.

== Bosses ==
:''For more information see [[Condition List]]''
Boss fights are conducted under special conditions, which are randomly assigned by the system and changes daily. Otherwise, fights begin with costing 1 AP, repeatedly challenging the same boss will increase the cost, with a max of 6 AP. Instances can only be soloed with one onmyouji and 5 shikigami fighting through three rounds of shikigami, with the boss being on the last round.

Enemies in the instance will have varying strength of attributes depending on the level the instance is set to - from 1 to 60. Their souls will not change. After completing the instance, there is an option to share the rankings for 20 jade reward, once weekly.

=== Rating ===
The higher the difficulty, the higher the rating. The more turns used, the lower the rating. The accumulated health loss also lowers rating. Thus, in some cases, passing a boss instance with lower difficulty but with fewer turns and health loss will give a better rating than passing a higher difficulty instance with poorer performance.

The lowest rating appears to be 100 and the highest appears to 36k.

=== KO Counter ===
Boss challenging interface also has a progress bar for each boss, documenting the number of times they've been defeated per day. The counter is also cross-server, and increments upon a successful or unsuccessful challenge towards the boss, repeated challenges count, including repeated losses. There are additional rewards for all players that participated in the boss challenge that day if milestones are met.

== Places of Gathering ==
All bosses will stay put in their respective regions, the shikigami of the rounds stay the same, and the shikigami at the locations only match them thematically. There is no added difficulty for any location, except for the Fame required to reach them.

These rewards are given immediately upon clearing the instance. Rankings-based rewards are given at the end of the day.

Amount of gold obtained is 30 * the difficulty level, and similarly for EXP it is 10 * the difficulty level.

=== Team Rankings ===
Players on the same server are randomly sorted into teams based on level, to be ranked based on their rating for each boss. Each team consists of 10 places, placing near the top gives better rewards (higher chance of SR/SSR shard and 6 star Soul). Rewards from team rankings for challenging various bosses will stack. The highest rating from all attempts is used for placement.

Bondling Fairyland:
[[File:BondlingFairyland banner.jpg|thumb|310x310px]] Bondling Fairyland (契霊の境) is a zone that unlocks at level 60. It is a zone where players can search for and obtain [[Bondlings]] which provide additional effects to the Onmyoji's stats and skills. Players spend 6 AP each time they search and have a chance of finding 1 random Bondling. Once a Bondling has been found, they will appear in the Bondling Fairyland for players to form a pact with them. Demon Seal:
[[File:000017e0 00000001.png|thumb|310px]]
Demon Seals (妖気封印) are a pop-up team zone where shikigami shards can be obtained. When found, a shortcut with an icon of red hands will appear on the left side of the explore map.

== Introduction ==
* Demon Seals can random spawn after clearing an explore zone.
* Demon Seals require 1 host and 1-2 guests. A minimum of 1 guest is need to challenge them.
* Challenging a Demon Seal costs 3 AP.
* Clearing the zone will reward players with shards the Demon Seal boss.
* Demons Seals for the following shikigami can be found:

** [[Futakuchi]]
** [[Umibouzu]]

===Pact Shards=== 
*Multiple zones can be accessed this area. Such as:
**'''Shikigami Shards''': Shard zones found after clearing a Challenge will appear here. Includes shard zones found by friends.
**'''EXP Spirit''': A zone that yields a large amount of EXP upon being defeated.
** '''Coin Spirit''': A zone that yields a large amount of coins upon being defeated.
**'''Mentorship Trial''': A zone that can only be accessed by mentors and their apprentices.
*The EXP and Coin Spirit can be cleared with 1 host and 1-4 guests. Unlike the pop-up team zones, guests are not need to challenge the zones.

===Team Zones===
*After clearing an explore zone, the is chance to find pop-up team zones. Such as: 
**[[Demon Seal]]
**[[Kraken Zones|Kraken (Mon-Fri) and Enraged Kraken (Sat-Sun)]]
**[[Nen]]
*After clearing stage 10 of the [[Soul Zones/Orochi|Orochi Soul Zone]], the is chance to find [[True Orochi|Ultimate Orochi]].
*These zones require 1 host and 1-2 guests. A minimum of 1 guest is need to challenge the zones.
*Additional zones may be available during events.

===Right Sidebar===
*It has shortcuts to explore zones and displays unlocked Challenge Zones.
*Challenge Zones can only be unlocked in chapters 1-18.

===Bottom Bar===

*It shows shortcuts to various zones. More information about the zones can be found on their individual pages.

== Explore Zones ==
===Explore===
* Challenge the shikigami minions in the zone and win to earn rewards.
*There are different rewards for different minions: 
**'''Coin Bonus''': Increases the coins earned by x 2.
**'''EXP Bonus''': Increases the EXP earned by x 2.
**'''Drop Bonus''': Increases the drop chances for all rewards.
*Each time a minion is defeated, there is a chance of the zone boss to appearing.
*When the zone boss is defeated, paper doll may look for treasure for you to receive.
*Harder versions of explore zones become unlocked after reaching certain player levels.

===Boss Challenge === 
*When paper doll looks for treasure, there is a chance for them to find a spirit leader.
*Once a spirit leader has been found, a Boss Challenge Pass can be used to challenge it.
*If you clear a Boss Challenge zone, you can get shards of the spirit leader and have a chance to find a Shikigami Shard zone.  
**The Shikigami Shard zone is accessed via the Pact Shards zone.
*Level for the enemies in challenge zones increase each time the zone has been cleared. Max is level 40.

Nen:
Nen is an instance that has a chance of appearing after clearing any chapter that is 4 or above. 

== Participation ==
It costs 12 AP to participate and there is a 12 hour cooldown. Nen has to be completed in a team, and this is either by clearing a chapter or joining from the team interface. Team setup is akin to other cooperative instances, and two spectator shikigami are also allowed.

Realm Raid:
Kekkai Toppa is a pseudo-PVP mechanism. It is accessed from the Kekkai Toppa button in Exploration. Just like Arena, a Judgement Flag will increase the damage sustained periodically so that the kekkai toppa do not drag on for too long. A successful kekkai toppa will give rewards such as stamina, jade, gold, kekkai cards, and orders.

== Individual ==
Is the default interface. Requires no stamina to do and no cooldown, save a 5 minute wait between refreshes, however, a challenge ticket is needed. Gives rewards at 3, 6, and 9 victories, as indicated by the toppa log. When all 9 kekkai defenses are successfully penetrated the list will refresh for more onmyouji to challenge.

=== Defense Log ===
:''For more information visit [[Kekkai#Kekkai Defense|Kekkai]]''
Kekkai defense is the team that is set up to prevent others from succeeding at Kekkai Toppa of the player's kekkai.

Players can check the records of how their defense performed against players that challenged it, watch replays from the past two days, and share them. Buggy and lengthy ones will not be recorded, however.

== Guild ==
No tickets are required, but player must be a member of an [[Guild]]. Guild kekkai toppa must be opened by a leader or vice leader, who have to select a ryou from many available, on a map.

If a rou toppa fails, the opposing ryou's player's name will be announced in the ryou channel so that others can attempt to defeat it. And a announcement will also be sent should a player look for a team to defeat a kekkai together

=== Ryou Information ===
The ryou that was selected for the toppa will be shown with its name and emblem.

==== Progress ====
Progress of toppa as a percentage (# of kekkai defeated/total kekkai x 100%) will be shown, along with a marker at 90% for successful penetration.

==== Rewards ====
Number of Guild orders to be gained from penetration will be shown.

==== Cooldown ====
Shows attempts left before having to wait for cooldown. Individual attempts for each ryou is 6, and each attempt takes a 10 minute cooldown to restore. Timer shows time until next restoration, and time until complete restoration of attempts. After kekkai toppa is initiated for 6 hours, the cooldown is shortened to 5 minutes. Team kekkai toppa allows 1 attempt, refreshing every 5 minutes.

==== Toppa Log/Record ====
This is a log that is open to everyone in the ryou to check who is doing kekkai toppa, whether toppa ended in success or failure, to whose kekkai, and when it happened. It will thus log repeats in that sometimes players will choose the same kekkai to attack, which is possible if the attacking player has yet to defeat it (rewards will be given out all the same).

The report only shows the situation for the current ryou, and not any past.

=== Toppa List ===
Shows the level of the onmyouji, their name, and the rank of their kekkai. Selecting a kekkai allows it to either be teamed for or attacked solo.

== Ranking and Rewards ==
The difficulty of individual kekkai toppa rises with the number of successful penetrations (i.e. get matched with higher-leveled players with more medals), but it is reset on Mondays at 6:00. At this time, rewards will also be distributed. Rewards will also be given for the number of successful kekkai defenses.

Secret Zone:
Secret zones are series of difficult challenge zones that are unlocked upon reaching player level 30. Each zone features a specific shikigami theme and contains special conditions within. Secret Zones can be found in Exploration. 

== Format ==
Secret Zone instances cost 3 stamina regardless of victory or loss. Clearing a stage allows the next stage to be challenged, and all unlocked stages can be challenged repeatedly.  

The 8-10th stage recordings can be viewed through battle playback, with the exception of Yamausagi's which allows 9th and 10th.

The instance must be soloed, but players can use friends' support shikigami up until the 9th stage, and each use is counted into the general limit of 15 uses.

All instances allow players to use 1 onmyouji and 5 shikigami, though enemy formations may differ. Additionally, some instances have special conditions and mechanisms which are not found elsewhere.

For more information see the list below.

=== List of Secret Zones ===
{{:{{PAGENAME}}/List}}

== Weekly Challenges ==
Challenges are re-runs of the original instances but with more difficult conditions. They take place over the period of Monday 9:00 to Sunday 23:59. All players that have passed stage 1-10 (not including bonus stage) of the original version may participate. Difficulty is increased by two additional enemies added to the fray, in the form of invincible snake demons that buffs the enemies and debuffs the player's party as well as attacking them.

There are two types of Weekly Secret zone challenges, Speed Challenge, and Strategy Challenge.

=== Speed Challenge ===
Players are ranked on the total time needed to clear all floors.

=== Strategy Challenge ===
The number of different shikigami used to clear the 10th floor will be recorded as the player's hundred battle effort and put into rankings. Players that have equal numbers will be ranked according to who reached that number first.

=== Rewards ===
All rewards are replaced with one-time rewards of jades that are 7x the floor number. Clearing a floor for the first time gives one-time rewards that cannot be obtained otherwise. You can use gold buff to double one-time gold reward.

After clearing the floor the subsequent rewards will be the regular rewards.

In addition to one-time stage rewards, a leaderboard is provided during the period of the weekly challenge in which players are ranked based off their accomplishment in that challenge. Ranking rewards include secret zone marks, and stickers of the featured zone, in addition to the rewards listed below.

Shikigami Dispatch:
{{UnderConstruction}}
Delegation is a mechanism that is used to exchange time and AP for rewards. It is unlocked when the onmyouji is level 13, and has cleared the second chapter of the main story. However, three delegations can be given simultaneously at level 30+, and four when level 50+.

== Introduction ==
Send out shikigami to complete their tasks, and get experience, gold, and other items as rewards. There are even 6-star Soul and keys to the goryou realm.

Shikigami that are sent out receives experience upon completion. The difficulty (level requirements of shikigami) of the missions also depend on their stars, but more difficult ones have better rewards. Each shikigami can only partake in one delegation at a given time, and must complete it before accepting any others.

=== Serial Delegations ===
They are refreshed at random. Each stage of mission takes 24 hours, and the greatest CD is also 24 hr (even if entire series is complete).

== Rewards ==
:''For more information visit [[Shikigami Delegation/List|Delegation List]]''
There is a relation between player level, delegation level, and associated rewards.
{| class="article-table"
|-
! Level !! Max Missions Simultaneously || Max Mission Star !! Max Soul Star
|-
| >=13 || 2 || 2-4
|-
| >=21 || 3 || 2-5
|-
| >=31 || 4 || 3-5
|-
| >=41 || 5 || 3-6
|-
| >=51 || 6 || 4-6
|}

Rewards include experience, gold, and drops. If lucky, there are also ones like 6 star Soul and Keys to the Goryou Realm, just pay attention to the mission interface.

Note that once players hit the AP cap of 9999, only dispatches costing over 100 AP will be available.

== Success Rates ==
The rewards have relation to the success rate of the mission:
* The higher the shikigami level, the more units that are awakened, the higher the chance for success
* Using recommended shikigami boosts chances for success
* It goes without saying, but the higher the success rate, the higher the chance for good rewards
{| class="article-table"
|-
! Result !! Rewards
|-
| Unsatisfactory (差强人意) || Base rewards
|-
| Successfully met (顺利达成) || Base rewards + success rewards
|-
| Perfect (完美达成) || Base rewards + success rewards + surprise
|}

Six Realms Gates:
{{UnderConstruction}} [[File:SixGate banner.jpg|thumb|310x310px]] The Six Realms Gates (六道之门/六道の扉) is a high difficulty zone and is unlocked at level 15. A few shikigami will be introduced to the Six Realms Gates as Trial Shikigami who will receive the great power of the Six Realms and face challengers. The world where the Six Realms are is highly unstable. Unforeseeable factors lie on each path to the end. After clearing the final challenge, players will be rated and granted rating rewards as well as achievement rewards for the Trial Shikigami. ==Six Gates== ===Moon Sea (月海)=== Dangerous enemies lurk in the quiet galaxy and the mysterious Moon Sea. Someone awaits a challenger in the unreachable distance. In the Moon Sea, the available Trial Shikigami are the SSR shikigami [[Shuten Douji]], the SR shikigami [[Hououka]] and the R shikigami [[Shouzu]]. ===Fragrance Realm (香行域)=== The sword has scattered all lightning and the thunder has dispersed all shadows. The execution of Jikokuten, the Evil God of Envy, begins! New changes have been made to the Six Realms, the Fragrant Realm (香行域) reveals itself as the mist of the past is dispersed, waiting to be challenged. In the Fragrance Realm, the available Trial Shikigami are the SSR shikigami [[Ootengu]], the SR shikigami [[Hakurou]] and the R shikigami [[Hotarugusa]]. ===Irregular Forest (季乱森)=== In the Land of Spring's Lament, where the four seasons have disappeared, the leaves wither in the Evil God of Gluttony's whispers. The onmyoji will enter the realm and rewrite a chapter of prosperity in this land of desolation. In the Irregular Forest, the available Trial Shikigami are the SSR shikigami [[Aoandon]], the SR shikigami [[Ubume]] and the R shikigami [[Sanbi no Kitsune]]. === Authentic Temple (浄仏刹) === After a sudden burst of light, a temple on a snow peak appeared in the Pureland Realm. Chanting echoes through the lecture hall. Embark on your journey to free yourself from your inner demon and find out the truth about life. In the Authentic Temple, the available Trial Shikigami are the SSR shikigami [[Ibaraki Douji]], the SR shikigami [[Yuki Onna]] and the R shikigami [[Kappa]]. ===Tower of Truth (真言塔)=== Lightning sizzles and takes form. Ame-no-Habakiri seals Hitokotonushi, the Evil God of Pride! A path of trials related to his divinity has appeared. Under the inky rain, the Tower of Truth revealed its true form, waiting for players to challenge it. In the Tower of Truth, the available Trial Shikigami are the SSR shikigami [[Arakawa no Aruji]], the SR shikigami [[Hone Onna]] and the R shikigami [[Baketanuki]]. === Peacock Kingdom === A sandstorm has brought carnage to the Peacock Kingdom. The oasis is now covered in sand. A pair of red demonic eyes stare out of the sandstorm at the white peacock in the center of the stage. Embark on this trial journey and slay the Evil God to end the unholy marriage. After defeating a powerful enemy, they become a Sentry (御神) and can project its power to help players on their journey in the Six Realms. *When players enter the Six Realms Gates for the first time, they will receive the initial form of the Sentries for free. *The power of an initial form of a Sentry is not fully activated upon receivable. The Sentry must be taken to Six Realms zones to increase their level (max Lv. 30). Complete achievement challenges to unlock more powerful abilities and a new look. * A Sentry's stat bonuses and skill effects are only effective in some of the Six Realms zones. Currently, they're only available during boss challenges for specific events and the Moon Sea zone. *Each Sentry has a total of 3 bonus stats and 3 passive skills which affect all allies. * A Sentry's skills and upgrades to their appearance are unlocked at Lv. 10/20/30. *The Sentry's appearance outside the world where the Six Realms are located (such as Duel, Souls Explore, Evo, etc) are for showcase only. ===Bonuses & Skills=== {{:Six Realms Gates/Sentry}} ==Achievements== Each Trial Shikigami has their own Achievement Rewards. An organised compilation of Onmyoji's lore and story content. Stories are also accessible from Retrospect via the courtyard tree and are divided into three sections: History, Side Story and The Rival. Currently, the only open section in Retrospect is History which contains the major arcs for Kuro Seimei, Sealand Invasion, Demoniac Feast, and the Takamagahara/Six Realms arc.

[[Side Story|Heian Tales]] and [[Assemble & Memory Scrolls|Memory Scrolls]] mostly provide background information for their related characters. They are not essential to fully understand event stories, but are highly recommended.
